name: simple_filter
expected_sql: SELECT * FROM [dbo].[normal-bulk] AS c WHERE c.partitionKey = ?

name: order_by_single
query: SELECT TOP 5 * FROM c ORDER BY c.id
expected_sql: SELECT TOP 5 * FROM [dbo].[normal-bulk] AS c ORDER BY c.id

name: order_by_desc
query: SELECT TOP 10 * FROM c ORDER BY c.timestamp DESC
expected_sql: SELECT TOP 10 * FROM [dbo].[normal-bulk] AS c ORDER BY c.timestamp DESC

name: count_with_filter
query: SELECT VALUE COUNT(1) FROM c WHERE c.partitionKey = @pk
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM [dbo].[normal-bulk] AS c WHERE c.partitionKey = ?

name: sum_aggregation
query: SELECT VALUE SUM(c.value) FROM c WHERE c.partitionKey = @pk
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(c.value) FROM [dbo].[normal-bulk] AS c WHERE c.partitionKey = ?

name: paged_with_offset_limit
query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.partitionKey = @pk ORDER BY c.id OFFSET 0 LIMIT 10
expected_sql: SELECT * FROM [dbo].[normal-bulk] AS c WHERE c.partitionKey = ? ORDER BY c.id OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY

name: paged_with_offset_limit_larger
query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.partitionKey = @pk ORDER BY c.id OFFSET 100 LIMIT 50
expected_sql: SELECT * FROM [dbo].[normal-bulk] AS c WHERE c.partitionKey = ? ORDER BY c.id OFFSET 100 ROWS FETCH NEXT 50 ROWS ONLY

name: multi_param
query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.partitionKey = @pk AND c.status = @status
expected_sql: SELECT * FROM [dbo].[normal-bulk] AS c WHERE c.partitionKey = ? AND c.status = ?

name: projection
query: SELECT c.id, c.partitionKey FROM c WHERE c.partitionKey = @pk
expected_sql: SELECT c.id, c.partitionKey FROM [dbo].[normal-bulk] AS c WHERE c.partitionKey = ?

name: avg_aggregation
query: SELECT VALUE AVG(c.value) FROM c WHERE c.partitionKey = @pk
expected_sql: SELECT AVG(c.value) FROM [dbo].[normal-bulk] AS c WHERE c.partitionKey = ?
